_doc: Stack-agnostic verification-loop config. Read by `.claude/hooks/verification_loop.py` (PostToolUse). After every Edit/Write/MultiEdit on a file matching `addon_globs`, the hook nudges the agent to run MCP probes (`python_syntax_check`, `python_import_check`) BEFORE claiming the change is done. Disable: set `enabled: false`. Customize `addon_globs` per project for narrower scope; default globs match common Python project layouts.
_doc_default_enabled: Defaults to `enabled: true` — installer policy: enforcement value > onboarding noise. If first-install floods nudges on a dirty project, set `enabled: false` here. Per-file dedupe (NUDGE_TTL_SECONDS=30) prevents same-file spam.

_upstream.author: @affaan-m
_upstream.note: Stack-agnostic variant — generic Python lint/syntax probes only. Framework-specific probes (e.g. Odoo manifest validate, Django model check) live in `verification.<framework>.json` overlays.
